<style id='global-styles-inline-css'>
:root{--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--square: 1;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--4-3: 4/3;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--3-4: 3/4;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--3-2: 3/2;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--2-3: 2/3;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--16-9: 16/9;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--9-16: 9/16;--wp--preset--color--black: #000000;--wp--preset--color--cyan-bluish-gray: #abb8c3;--wp--preset--color--white: #ffffff;--wp--preset--color--pale-pink: #f78da7;--wp--preset--color--vivid-red: #cf2e2e;--wp--preset--color--luminous-vivid-orange: #ff6900;--wp--preset--color--luminous-vivid-amber: #fcb900;--wp--preset--color--light-green-cyan: #7bdcb5;--wp--preset--color--vivid-green-cyan: #00d084;--wp--preset--color--pale-cyan-blue: #8ed1fc;--wp--preset--color--vivid-cyan-blue: <style id='generate-offside-inline-css'>
:root{--gp-slideout-width:265px;}.slideout-navigation, .slideout-navigation a{color:#000000;}.slideout-navigation button.slideout-exit{color:#000000;padding-left:15px;padding-right:15px;}.slide-opened nav.toggled .menu-toggle:before{display:none;}@media (max-width: 1080px){.menu-bar-item.slideout-toggle{display:none;}}

</style>

	<div data-rocket-location-hash="6a7752b0fe5e2826d9bec83343ebd4b4" class="site grid-container container hfeed" id="page">
				<div data-rocket-location-hash="c33c4fce18a59394969db408ab04288a" class="site-content" id="content">

<div class="gb-element-e581cc1d">
<h1 class="gb-text gb-text-aa60aff8">Yumivo: Joy in Every Forkful</h1>



<p class="gb-text gb-text-767b0878">Yumivo began with hand-me-down recipes, bustling kitchens, and Sunday laughter. Today we share the kind of comforting meals that feel like home—simple, reliable, and made to bring people together.</p>



<a class="gb-text gb-text-6ba9ddd7" href="/explore/">Browse All Recipes</a>
</div>
</div>



<div class="gb-element-7050d0f3">
<div class="gb-element-6d3bd198">
<div class="gb-element-a7a4b3e9">
<h2 class="gb-text-6693c1a0"><span class="gb-shape"><svg viewBox="-7.2 -7.2 38.40 38.40" data-name="016_FOOD" id="_016_FOOD" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="#000000" transform="rotate(180)" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.00024000000000000003"><g id="SVGRepo_bgCarrier" stroke-width="0"><rect x="-7.2" y="-7.2" width="38.40" height="38.40" rx="19.2" fill="#000000" strokewidth="0"></rect></g><g id="SVGRepo_tracerCarrier" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></g><g id="SVGRepo_iconCarrier"><defs><style>.cls-1{fill:#FBD657;}</style></defs><path class="cls-1" d="M8.68,15.31c-2.17-2.16-4.83-3-6-1.88s-.29,3.8,1.88,6,4.82,3,6,1.88S10.84,17.47,8.68,15.31ZM7.8,19c-.39.39-1.34.07-2.12-.71S4.58,16.58,5,16.19s1.34-.08,2.12.71S8.19,18.63,7.8,19Z"></path><path class="cls-1" d="M9,21.94a6.81,6.81,0,0,1-4.82-2.12,6.39,6.39,0,0,1-1.23-8,9.45,9.45,0,0,1,9-4L13.47,6.3a2.89,2.89,0,0,1-.3-1.3,3,3,0,0,1,.88-2.12,3.07,3.07,0,0,1,4.24,0,3,3,0,0,1,.88,2,3,3,0,0,1,1.95.88A3,3,0,1,1,16.88,10a1,1,0,0,1,1.41-1.41,1,1,0,1,0,1.42-1.42A1,1,0,0,0,19,6.83,1.86,1.86,0,0,1,17.17,5a1,1,0,0,0-.29-.71,1,1,0,0,0-1.41,0,1,1,0,0,0-.3.71,1,1,0,0,0,.29.71,1,1,0,0,1,0,1.41L12.93,9.69a1,1,0,0,1-1,.25c-2-.68-5.8.56-7.28,3a4.38,4.38,0,0,0,1,5.51,4.38,4.38,0,0,0,5.52.93c2.39-1.41,3.63-5.14,3-7.2a1,1,0,0,1,1.91-.6c1,3.13-.88,7.76-3.86,9.52A6.12,6.12,0,0,1,9,21.94Z"></path></g></svg></span><span class="gb-text">Latest</span></h2>

<div data-rocket-location-hash="af8b21984d56ef1995d8153e42266d5d">
<img decoding="async" width="1024" height="1024" class="gb-media-5ec823d8" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%201024'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q" title="p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q" data-lazy-srcset="https://yumivo.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q.jpeg 1024w, https://yumivo.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q-300x300.jpeg 300w, https://yumivo.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q-150x150.jpeg 150w, https://yumivo.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q-768x768.jpeg 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px" data-lazy-src="https://yumivo.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q.jpeg"><noscript><img decoding="async" width="1024" height="1024" class="gb-media-5ec823d8" src="https://yumivo.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q.jpeg" alt="p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q" title="p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q" srcset="https://yumivo.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q.jpeg 1024w, https://yumivo.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q-300x300.jpeg 300w, https://yumivo.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q-150x150.jpeg 150w, https://yumivo.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/p0au9hSOQdmV5Olfb5AI9Q-768x768.jpeg 768w" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"></noscript>
</div>



<div>
<p class="gb-text gb-text-698c7283">Hi there! I’m Julia Whitaker</p>



<p class="has-medium-font-size">My kitchen is where creativity, comfort, and connection all come together.</p>



<p class="has-medium-font-size">I’m 34 years old and live in Austin, Texas, where the food scene is as colorful and diverse as the people. From barbecue to tacos to fresh market produce, there’s always inspiration just around the corner. My love for cooking began when I was a kid, perched on a stool beside my mom, helping her stir cookie dough or chop vegetables for Sunday dinner. Those small moments became the spark that lit a lifelong passion.</p>



<a class="gb-text-bc854c58" href="/about/"><span class="gb-text">Learn More About Me</span><span class="gb-shape"><svg aria-hidden="true" role="img" height="1em" width="1em" viewBox="0 0 256 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="currentColor" d="M224.3 273l-136 136c-9.4 9.4-24.6 9.4-33.9 0l-22.6-22.6c-9.4-9.4-9.4-24.6 0-33.9l96.4-96.4-96.4-96.4c-9.4-9.4-9.4-24.6 0-33.9L54.3 103c9.4-9.4 24.6-9.4 33.9 0l136 136c9.5 9.4 9.5 24.6.1 34z"></path></svg></span></a>
</div>
</div>
</div>



<div class="gb-element-9cc79930">
<div class="gb-element-e29572e6">
<div class="gb-element-6132d7d9">
<h2 class="gb-text-8f7d2d7e"><span class="gb-shape"><svg viewBox="-7.2 -7.2 38.40 38.40" data-name="016_FOOD" id="_016_FOOD" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="#000000" transform="rotate(180)" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.00024000000000000003"><g id="SVGRepo_bgCarrier" stroke-width="0"><rect x="-7.2" y="-7.2" width="38.40" height="38.40" rx="19.2" fill="#000000" strokewidth="0"></rect></g><g id="SVGRepo_tracerCarrier" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></g><g id="SVGRepo_iconCarrier"><defs><style>.cls-1{fill:#FBD657;}</style></defs><path class="cls-1" d="M8.68,15.31c-2.17-2.16-4.83-3-6-1.88s-.29,3.8,1.88,6,4.82,3,6,1.88S10.84,17.47,8.68,15.31ZM7.8,19c-.39.39-1.34.07-2.12-.71S4.58,16.58,5,16.19s1.34-.08,2.12.71S8.19,18.63,7.8,19Z"></path><path class="cls-1" d="M9,21.94a6.81,6.81,0,0,1-4.82-2.12,6.39,6.39,0,0,1-1.23-8,9.45,9.45,0,0,1,9-4L13.47,6.3a2.89,2.89,0,0,1-.3-1.3,3,3,0,0,1,.88-2.12,3.07,3.07,0,0,1,4.24,0,3,3,0,0,1,.88,2,3,3,0,0,1,1.95.88A3,3,0,1,1,16.88,10a1,1,0,0,1,1.41-1.41,1,1,0,1,0,1.42-1.42A1,1,0,0,0,19,6.83,1.86,1.86,0,0,1,17.17,5a1,1,0,0,0-.29-.71,1,1,0,0,0-1.41,0,1,1,0,0,0-.3.71,1,1,0,0,0,.29.71,1,1,0,0,1,0,1.41L12.93,9.69a1,1,0,0,1-1,.25c-2-.68-5.8.56-7.28,3a4.38,4.38,0,0,0,1,5.51,4.38,4.38,0,0,0,5.52.93c2.39-1.41,3.63-5.14,3-7.2a1,1,0,0,1,1.91-.6c1,3.13-.88,7.76-3.86,9.52A6.12,6.12,0,0,1,9,21.94Z"></path></g></svg></span><span class="gb-text">Trending</span></h2>

</div>



<div class="gb-element-d9e4bc9d">
<a class="gb-text-30ebf639" href="/"><span class="gb-shape"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24px" viewBox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" fill="#1f1f1f"><path d="M180-120q-25 0-42.5-17.5T120-180v-76l160-142v278H180Zm140 0v-160h320v160H320Zm360 0v-328L509-600l121-107 190 169q10 9 15 20.5t5 24.5v313q0 25-17.5 42.5T780-120H680ZM120-310v-183q0-13 5-25t15-20l300-266q8-8 18.5-11.5T480-819q11 0 21.5 3.5T520-804l80 71-480 423Z"></path></svg></span><span class="gb-text">Home</span></a>



<a class="gb-text-db42f086" href="/authors/"><span class="gb-shape"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24px" viewBox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" fill="#1f1f1f"><path d="M480-240Zm-320 80v-112q0-34 17.5-62.5T224-378q62-31 126-46.5T480-440q37 0 73 4.5t72 14.5l-67 68q-20-3-39-5t-39-2q-56 0-111 13.5T260-306q-9 5-14.5 14t-5.5 20v32h240v80H160Zm400 40v-123l221-220q9-9 20-13t22-4q12 0 23 4.5t20 13.5l37 37q8 9 12.5 20t4.5 22q0 11-4 22.5T903-340L683-120H560Zm300-263-37-37 37 37ZM620-180h38l121-122-18-19-19-18-122 121v38Zm141-141-19-18 37 37-18-19ZM480-480q-66 0-113-47t-47-113q0-66 47-113t113-47q66 0 113 47t47 113q0 66-47 113t-113 47Zm0-80q33 0 56.5-23.5T560-640q0-33-23.5-56.5T480-720q-33 0-56.5 23.5T400-640q0 33 23.5 56.5T480-560Zm0-80Z"></path></svg></span><span class="gb-text">Authors</span></a>

                        var js, fjs = d.getElementsByTagName(s)[0];
                        if (d.getElementById(id)) return;
                        js = d.createElement(s);
                        js.id = id;
                        js.src = "https://connect.facebook.net/en_US/sdk.js#xfbml=1&version=v3.2";
                        fjs.parentNode.insertBefore(js, fjs);
                    }(document, 'script', 'facebook-jssdk'));

        sfsi_responsive_toggle(0);
        // console.log('sfsi_responsive_toggle');

    }

    <script type="rocketlazyloadscript">window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        window.addEventListener('sfsi_functions_loaded', function () {
            if (typeof sfsi_plugin_version == 'function') {
                sfsi_plugin_version(2.77);
            }
        });

        function sfsi_processfurther(ref) {
            var feed_id = 'bGovWDJ5YWRtZzBrL3ZybEE3SkdGejFGb0FkU0FrcHZ6Y3N3QkN2WHVJWEEwYXJWNVpacyt3THZGWDFOekVROFdPYlhWZVZ5OUI1NkF2Zk9GdGZuMVkzLzIxVDJqOUNKcW9JTVUwWkdUQWpYRmR3cEN5U0FBQ2Y4cHR1a2RpUGR8VENiNFpUT1hTeUx3azQ2aUVoeFk0cHlwcDE0QUwyZklTZEJERm9qbUpWZz0=';
            var feedtype = 8;
            var email = jQuery(ref).find('input[name="email"]').val();
            var filter = /^(([^<>()[\]\\.,;:\s@\"]+(\.[^<>()[\]\\.,;:\s@\"]+)*)|(\".+\"))@((\[[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\])|(([a-zA-Z\-0-9]+\.)+[a-zA-Z]{2,}))$/;
            if ((email != "Enter your email") && (filter.test(email))) {
                if (feedtype == "8") {
                    var url = "https://api.follow.it/subscription-form/" + feed_id + "/" + feedtype;
                    window.open(url, "popupwindow", "scrollbars=yes,width=1080,height=760");
                    return true;
                }
            } else {
                alert("Please enter email address");
                jQuery(ref).find('input[name="email"]').focus();
                return false;
            }
        }
    });</script>

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript" data-minify="1" data-rocket-src="https://yumivo.com/wp-content/cache/min/1/wp-content/plugins/ultimate-social-media-icons/js/custom.js?ver=1761964573" id="SFSICustomJs-js" data-rocket-defer defer></script>

<script>window.lazyLoadOptions=[{elements_selector:"img[data-lazy-src],.rocket-lazyload,iframe[data-lazy-src]",data_src:"lazy-src",data_srcset:"lazy-srcset",data_sizes:"lazy-sizes",class_loading:"lazyloading",class_loaded:"lazyloaded",threshold:300,callback_loaded:function(element){if(element.tagName==="IFRAME"&&element.dataset.rocketLazyload=="fitvidscompatible"){if(element.classList.contains("lazyloaded")){if(typeof window.jQuery!="undefined"){if(jQuery.fn.fitVids){jQuery(element).parent().fitVids()}}}}}},{elements_selector:".rocket-lazyload",data_src:"lazy-src",data_srcset:"lazy-srcset",data_sizes:"lazy-sizes",class_loading:"lazyloading",class_loaded:"lazyloaded",threshold:300,}];window.addEventListener('LazyLoad::Initialized',function(e){var lazyLoadInstance=e.detail.instance;if(window.MutationObserver){var observer=new MutationObserver(function(mutations){var image_count=0;var iframe_count=0;var rocketlazy_count=0;mutations.forEach(function(mutation){for(var i=0;i<mutation.addedNodes.length;i++){if(typeof mutation.addedNodes[i].getElementsByTagName!=='function'){continue}
